relationships: ber:Tom yesselmad tafṛansit deg uɣerbaz n Mary

ber:Mi d-teffeɣ Mary seg umahil, yessaweḍ-itt Tom ɣer uxxam

ber:Mary tenna-d dakken twala taɣawsa tamafagt ur yettwaεeqlen

ber:Ulac ccek dakken Tom ibedd-as i Mary
ber:Ɛni ur tellimt ara teẓramt dakken Tom ira Mary﹖
ber:Kraḍ n yiseggasen aya seg wasmi ay myussanen Tom ed Mary
ber:Ɛni ur tellimt ara teẓramt dakken Tom iḥemmel Mary﹖
